Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x3400 "ACTIONBIKER99-2000-3400" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $2000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Action Biker '99 (Re-Hashed by Jon Wells).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $2000 which sets up the correct VICII settings and border colour before starting the game.
Note: As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $30E8. However the true start address is $3400.
